name: Maribel Guardia
description: '''Maribel del Rocío Fernández García''' (born 29 May 1959), known professionally as '''Maribel Guardia''',{{efn|{{bulleted list|In this name that follows [[Naming customs of Hispanic America|Hispanic American naming customs]], the surname is ''[[Fernández]]'' and the second or maternal family name is ''[[García (surname)|García]]''.|Pronounced {{IPA|es|maɾiˈβel ˈɣwaɾðja}}}}}} is a Costa Rican-Mexican actress, singer, and television personality. She began her career as a [[beauty pageant]] contestant in Costa Rica, where she won [[Miss Costa Rica]] 1978 and went on to represent the country at [[Miss Universe 1978]]. Since 1980, she has worked in Mexico, appearing in numerous [[Telenovela|telenovelas]], [[Ficheras|fichera films]], and variety shows. She has also developed a career as a singer of [[Regional Mexican]] music.
